text: The AMC report does not make direct choices. It clarifies the structural trade-off and conditions that make each path more or less defensible.
That request goes beyond the current report scope. It would require an additional external analysis layer rather than direct interpretation of this report.
That is outside this report-interpreter scope. It is better handled as a separate document-support workflow.
This report is designed to structure uncertainty, not provide reassurance. What it does clarify is where pressure concentrates and which conditions reduce exposure.
The question is currently broad. Please point to a specific section or field so the interpretation can stay precise and report-grounded.
That question goes beyond the current report scope. The present report supports structural interpretation of trade-offs, risk, and commitment conditions.
What the report does clarify is the structure of the decision tension and where exposure or optionality is concentrated.
This can be addressed through a follow-up analysis pass with additional assumptions or external inputs, while keeping the same AMC structural framework.
